benefits.description: Used for arthritis and other conditions (both user and wife)

protocol_notes: Both user and wife are older with arthritis and other conditions. Both use injectable subQ BPC-157 at 400mcg once daily. Separately notes father-in-law (88 years old) uses BPC-157 with TB4 at 400mcg once daily, later escalated to 800mcg/day total (400mcg twice daily) for severe neck pain from pinched disk with significant improvement after traditional medicine failed.
